items.headline: U.S. Markets Rebound Sharply on Iran Diplomacy Hopes, Oil Prices Plunge
items.summary: U.S. stock markets surged on Monday, reversing earlier global declines, as hopes for a diplomatic resolution in the Middle East conflict emerged. President Trump's announcement of postponed strikes on Iran's energy infrastructure led to a significant drop in oil prices, boosting investor sentiment. The S&P 500, Nasdaq, and Dow Jones Industrial Average all saw strong gains.

items.headline: GE Vernova ($GEV) Soars on Market Optimism
items.summary: Shares of GE Vernova jumped, benefiting from the broader market's rebound and positive sentiment following geopolitical developments.

items.headline: Planet Labs ($PL) Jumps on Strong Earnings
items.summary: Planet Labs PBC surged after reporting blowout Q4 2025 earnings, with revenue exceeding estimates and a significant increase in its backlog.

items.headline: TeraWulf ($WULF) Rallies as Bitcoin Surges
items.summary: Crypto-linked stocks, including TeraWulf, saw significant gains as Bitcoin climbed above $71K, driven by easing geopolitical tensions and improved risk sentiment.

items.headline: Valneva SE ($VALN) Declines Amid Broader Volatility
items.summary: Valneva SE experienced a sharp decline, part of mixed individual stock performance among small-cap names and elevated market volatility.

items.headline: Equinor ASA ($EQNR) Slides on Plunging Oil Prices
items.summary: Shares of Equinor ASA fell in pre-market trading as global oil prices plummeted following news of potential de-escalation in the Middle East conflict.

items.headline: GD Culture Group ($GDC) Faces Significant Drop
items.summary: GD Culture Group Limited saw a substantial decline, attributed to ongoing dilution and compliance pressures, a common challenge for micro-cap gaming/multimedia stocks.

items.headline: Oil Prices Plunge on Trump's Iran Diplomacy Announcement
items.summary: Brent crude oil prices dropped by over 10% to around $100.46 per barrel after President Trump stated he was postponing attacks on Iranian energy infrastructure to allow for diplomatic talks. This marked a significant reversal from earlier elevated prices.

items.headline: Fed Holds Rates Steady; Inflation Projections Revised Upward
items.summary: The Federal Reserve opted not to increase interest rates in its recent FOMC meeting, holding them steady at 3.50-3.75%. The March 2026 Summary of Economic Projections, however, showed a slight upward revision in core inflation projections for 2026 and 2027.

items.headline: Technology Sector Leads Gains; Nasdaq Launches New Indexes
items.summary: The technology sector was a leading performer, particularly discretionary and industrial tech stocks. Separately, Nasdaq officially launched three new indexes, including the Nasdaq Sprott Rare Earths Ex-China Index, effective today.

items.headline: RTC Group Reports Earnings; Major Companies on Deck for the Week
items.summary: RTC Group announced its earnings today. This week's earnings calendar includes other notable companies such as Carnival ($CCL), GameStop ($GME), Beyond Meat ($BYND), PDD Holdings ($PDD), and Chewy ($CHWY), signaling a busy reporting period.
